title: Bridge Atlas - Episode 3: Commons | Yancey Strickler & Trent Van Epps
description:
Cofounder of Kickstarter, Metalabel, and more, Yancey Strickler has a lot to say about creative commons. He's joined by one of the organizers behind Protocol Guild, which is pioneering a forward-thinking funding mechanism that supports developers working on open-source software. There are a lot shared principles underlying both Metalabel and Protocol Guild – Christine ask questions as Trent and Yancey unfold bridges to and from unlikely places, from the color spectrum to cooperatives.

Sign up for Bridge Atlas Day at Devconnect: https://devconnect.org/calendar?event=bridge-atlas
---------------------------------------------------------------
References
- Capital and Enclosure in Software Commons (https://summerofprotocols.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/Capital-Enclosure-for-Software-Commons-Trent-Van-Epps.pdf)
- When the Means Justify the Ends (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dsO8DwV0eaQ)
- Dark Forest OS (https://www.dfos.com/)
- Metalabel (https://www.metalabel.com/?srsltid=AfmBOoqCcPhaNzr-99P1K59WeThh33cd7XMiRnI_13iWhzgsZdZRekvn)
- Protocol Guild (https://www.protocolguild.org/)
